name: Honey Walnut Drops
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the sugar and honey until smooth.
2. Add the shortening and eggs to the mixture. Beat until well combined.
3. In a separate bowl, sift the flour. Stir in the baking soda and salt.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the creamed mixture alternately with the sour cream, stirring after each addition until just combined.
5. Fold in the chopped walnuts, flaked coconut, and vanilla extract.
6. Drop rounded teaspoonfuls of dough onto a greased baking sheet.
7. Place one walnut half or a sprinkle of coconut on top of each drop.
8. Bake at 375°F for 10 to 12 minutes, or until lightly golden brown.
